/Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/usr/bin/c++  -O3 -DNDEBUG -march=native -isysroot /Library/Developer/CommandLineTools/SDKs/MacOSX26.2.sdk -mmacosx-version-min=15.7 -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names  CMakeFiles/scheduler_sim.dir/apps/main.cpp.o  -o bin/scheduler_sim  lib/libscheduler_core.a lib/libschedulers.a lib/libworkloads.a -lm lib/libscheduler_core.a lib/librandom_lib.a
